name: Rapid Transfer Loop
description: Fast-cycling transfers between accounts - classic layering technique
gsql_query: MATCH (a1:BankAccount)-[t:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(a2:BankAccount) WITH a1, a2, t, count(*) as transfer_count WHERE transfer_count >= {min_transfers} RETURN a1, a2, transfer_count
remediation: Block account pending review if risk_score > 0.8
File CTR if any single transaction > $10,000
File SAR if pattern is clearly structured
